meta.description: Coleccion de pruebas para endpoints de security, users, roles, profiles, sessions, user-role y users-query

request.name: Security/Register
Security/Login
Security/2FA Verify
Security/2FA Resend
Security/2FA Cancel Session
Security/Forgot Password
Security/Reset Password

Security/OAuth Google URL
Security/OAuth Microsoft URL

Security/OAuth Google Callback
Security/OAuth Microsoft Callback
Security/OAuth GitHub Unlink
Security/OAuth Google Unlink
Security/OAuth Microsoft Unlink

Users/Get By Id
Users/Create

Users/Delete
Users/Add Profile
Users/Remove Profile
Users/Add Session
Users/Remove Session

Roles/Create
Roles/Update

Roles/Delete

Profiles/Update
Profiles/Delete
